# Trainer Center
> California's only Pokemon-exclusive store. Located in Huntington Beach, CA.

## About
Trainer Center is the only Pokemon-exclusive store in California. Located at 4911 Warner Ave #210, Huntington Beach, CA 92649. This is not a generic TCG shop that happens to carry Pokemon. Everything in this store is Pokemon. Cards from every era, collectibles, sealed product, PSA graded slabs, and accessories. We also offer PSA grading submission services, private collection consultations, and buy/sell/consignment. No other TCG. No sports cards. No Magic. Just Pokemon.

## Contact
- Phone: (714) 951-9100
- Email: Trainercenter.pokemon@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/trainercenter.pokemon/
- Website: https://pokemontrainercenter.com

## Hours
- Sunday: 10 AM - 5 PM
- Monday: Closed
- Tuesday: Noon - 8 PM
- Wednesday: Noon - 8 PM
- Thursday: Noon - 8 PM
- Friday: Noon - 10 PM
- Saturday: 10 AM - 8 PM

## Weekly Events
- Sunday: Painting Day - families and kids paint Pokemon and crafts
- Tuesday: Masterset with Larry - learn to build and complete card sets
- Wednesday: Game Day with Seth - video games, cards, and hangouts
- Thursday: Private Consultation with Chef - appraisals, strategy, TCG coaching
- Friday: Trade Night - weekly Pokemon card trading event
- Saturday: Community Day - all-day open hangout
- Last Friday of each month: Vendor Day - free vendor setup, Noon to 10 PM

## Services
- Pokemon card singles, sealed product, and graded cards
- PSA grading submissions (we evaluate, submit, and return graded cards)
- Private collection consultation and appraisals
- Buy collections and consignment
- Weekly trade nights and community events

## Location
4911 Warner Ave #210, Huntington Beach, CA 92649
Located in Harbour Landing shopping center
